item.doraemon_pocket.bamboo_copter.toolt: Wear it on your head. Hold jump to rise, hold sneak to descend.
item.doraemon_pocket.air_cannon.tooltip: Right-click to fire an air blast that knocks back entities.
item.doraemon_pocket.shock_gun.tooltip: Right-click to stun normal mobs; stunned targets wake up when damaged.
item.doraemon_pocket.dodge_cloak.tooltip: Wear it in the chest slot or hold it for a chance to dodge damage and deflect projectiles.
item.doraemon_pocket.time_cloth.tooltip: Hold it in one hand and a damaged item in the other, then right-click to spend 30 XP repairing it.
item.doraemon_pocket.adaptation_light.to: Keep it in inventory or hand to maintain environmental adaptation.
item.doraemon_pocket.momotaro_dumpling.t: Right-click to throw or feed it. Large targets can be ridden; sneak-right-click to release.
item.doraemon_pocket.anywhere_door.toolt: Use /doraemon_pocket anywhere_door <pos> while holding it, right-click a block to place it, right-click the door to toggle it, sneak-right-click to recover it.
item.doraemon_pocket.pass_loop.tooltip: Right-click a surface to place and link it; right-click or enter to pass through, sneak-right-click to recover it.
item.doraemon_pocket.stone_hat.tooltip: Wear it on your head to make mobs ignore you. It falls off when touching water.
item.doraemon_pocket.radar_sword.tooltip: Hold it to auto-parry frontal projectiles and counter nearby attackers.
item.doraemon_pocket.depleted_radar_swor: Its auto-defense power is drained, but it still works as a sword.
item.doraemon_pocket.plant_modification_: Use on logs to grow coconut fruits.
item.doraemon_pocket.coconut.tooltip: Right-click to open it and receive 1 to 3 random vanilla foods.
item.doraemon_pocket.apartment_tree.tool: Right-click the ground to plant it, then use bone meal to grow underground rooms.
message.doraemon_pocket.anywhere_door.mu: Hold an Anywhere Door in your main hand or offhand
message.doraemon_pocket.anywhere_door.no: Hold an Anywhere Door and run /doraemon_pocket anywhere_door <x> <y> <z> first
message.doraemon_pocket.anywhere_door.ne: Right-click a block to place the Anywhere Door
message.doraemon_pocket.anywhere_door.sa: Anywhere Door currently only links within the same dimension
message.doraemon_pocket.anywhere_door.no: Not enough space for both Anywhere Door portals
message.doraemon_pocket.pass_loop.no_cav: Pass Loop found no open cavity to link
message.doraemon_pocket.plant_modificati: Use Plant Modification Liquid on a log
This tree has no room for coconut fruits
